title: Schopenhauer in the Air
author: Sadakichi Hartmann
description: Sadakichi Hartmann was an art and literary critic who wrote plays, short stories and several volumes of poetry. Hauntingly beautiful, these seven early short stories dance with themes of beauty and death, love and the soul, and existence itself. As found in the book's biographical note: sometimes a great author tears the mask from life, so we may look at the truth of beauty. Summary by Nemo.

title: Moo Cow Tales (Version 2)
author: Rosamund Edith Nesbit Bland
description: Four short children's stories regarding a family's barnyard cows and their comical adventures. - Summary by Alicia S

title: King in Yellow (part 1)
author: Robert W. Chambers
description: Robert W. Chambers (1865-1933) studied art in Paris in the late 80's and early 90's, where his work was displayed at the Salon. However, shortly after returning to America, he decided to spend his time in writing. He became popular as the writer of a number of romantic novels, but is now best known as the author of "The King In Yellow". This is a collection of the first half of this work of short stories which have an eerie, other-worldly feel to it; but the stories in the second half are essentially love stories, strongly coloured by the author's life as an artist in France. Only the first half of the collection of stories is presented here: the earlier stories are all coloured by the background presence of a play, "The King In Yellow" itself, which corrupts those who read it, and opens them to horrible experiences and to visions of a ghastly other world, lit by dark stars and distorted skies. This half of the collection is completed by a few very short pieces and two rather strange and beautiful stories of love and time, loneliness and death. (summary by Peter Yearsley)

title: New Arabian Nights
author: Robert Louis Stevenson
description: New Arabian Nights is a collection of short stories which include Robert Louis Stevenson's earliest fiction as well as those considered his best work in the genre. The first and longest story stars Prince Florizel of Bohemia who appears in the later collection of stories "More New Arabian Nights: The Dynamiter." (Summary by Don W. Jenkins)

title: How To Write Short Stories, with examples
author: Ring Lardner
description: Here are 10 humorous short stories by Ring Lardner (March 5, 1885 – September 25, 1933), an American sports columnist and short-story writer best known for his satirical writings on sports, marriage, and the theatre. His contemporaries Ernest Hemingway, Virginia Woolf, and F. Scott Fitzgerald all professed strong admiration for his writing. ( Wikipedia and Michele Fry)

title: In a Steamer Chair and Other Stories
author: Robert Barr
description: Thirteen short stories by one of the most famous writers in his day. Robert Barr was a British Canadian short story writer and novelist, born in Glasgow, Scotland. In London of the 1890s Barr became a more prolific author - publishing a book a year - and was familiar with many of the best selling authors of his day, including Bret Harte and Stephen Crane. Most of his literary output was of the crime genre, then quite in vogue. When Arthur Conan Doyle's Sherlock Holmes stories were becoming well known, Barr published in the Idler the first Holmes parody, "The Adventures of Sherlaw Kombs" (1892), a spoof that was continued a decade later in another Barr story, "The Adventure of the Second Swag" (1904) (For these two stories, see in LibriVox Barr's The Triumphs of Eugène Valmont). Despite the jibe at the growing Holmes phenomenon Barr and Doyle remained on very good terms. Doyle describes him in his memoirs Memories and Adventures as, "a volcanic Anglo - or rather Scot American, with a violent manner, a wealth of strong adjectives, and one of the kindest natures underneath it all." (Summary by Wikipedia and David Wales)

title: Stateside with Lee
author: Lee Coppin
description: Stateside with Lee follows one expat's journey from Brit to bona fide US citizen — and everything he's learned along the way. Each episode, Lee explores a different corner of America: the small towns, big cities, roadside diners, national parks, and local characters that make up the real country beneath the headlines. No politics, no punditry — just genuine curiosity about the people, food, traditions, and quirks that make the USA what it is. Whether he's chasing down the best barbecue in Texas, learning why Midwesterners say "you betcha," or figuring out what exactly a "block party" is, Lee brings an outsider's eye and an insider's heart to it all. Part travel show, part culture deep-dive, part love letter to his adopted home, Stateside with Lee is for anyone who's ever wondered what America looks like through fresh eyes — and anyone who's made a new country their own.

title: Beautiful Dreamer: An Audio Drama
author: ST
description: Beautiful Dreamer is an audio drama of the life and music of America’s first professional composer, Stephen Foster.

title: The Right Expert With Bob Craig
author: therightexpertwithbobcraig
description: The Right Expert with Bob Craig is a podcast dedicated to exploring the nuances of expert witness selection and its impact on complex litigation. Designed for legal professionals, the show provides valuable insights into the art of matching experts with cases, ensuring effective communication and collaboration. Host Lisa Mosbey, along with experienced guests like Bob Craig, delves into topics such as expert retention, case strategy, and the human elements of legal proceedings. The series aims to equip attorneys with the knowledge and tools needed to enhance their litigation outcomes through strategic expert engagement.

title: Mx JacklyNyx Nyghtmares
author: Amberousis
description: Actual play tabletop gaming with action horror themes, focused on social, environmental, and industrial degradation.

title: Hook Em' and Book Em'
author: ATX Self-Tape Studio
description:
🎙️ Hook Em' & Book Em' - An Acting podcast.
🎭 Helping Actors navigate the world of film and modern audition process so they can succeed.
🌎 Actors from all over the world pull back the curtain on the audition process and discuss what keeps them motivated to keep performing and auditioning in the modern world.
🎥Whether you're a seasoned professional or just starting your acting journey, we deliver the insights, tips, and motivation you need to book your next role. We're here to help you...HOOK EM" & BOOK EM'!
🎬 PRESENTED BY ATX SELF-TAPE
Visit www.atxselftape.com for more!

title: Billion Dollar Blunder
description: Billion Dollar Blunder is a business-history podcast about the companies that had everything and lost it. Each episode is a cinematic deep dive into a single spectacular collapse: the fraud, the hubris, the warning nobody heeded, and the exact moment it all came apart.

title: The Hour Before Dark
description: The Hour Before Dark is a true crime podcast that dramatizes real cases — cold cases, unsolved disappearances, serial killers, infamous trials, and crimes with unexpected twists. Every story feels like a movie the listener can see in their head.

title: The Void Report
description: The Void Report is a paranormal and unexplained podcast built like a case file. Each episode opens a single file: a vanished plane, a signal from space, a photograph that shouldn't exist — and lays out the evidence, the witnesses, and the competing explanations, cold and clear. Some cases close with an answer you didn't expect. Some stay open. You never know which until the end.

title: Empires and Ashes
description: Empires & Ashes is a history podcast about the moments the world turned. Each episode is a cinematic deep dive into a single pivotal event: an empire's fall, a disaster, a rebellion, a decision made in a room that changed everything after.

title: Revenue Rocks
author: Right Revenue
description: Revenue Rocks… brought to you by Right Revenue… a place where we cut through the noise of revenue management and give you practical advice you can actually use

title: The Science of Everyday Materials
author: Rick Hernandez
description: The hidden science of the ordinary stuff around you. Short, warm, plain-language episodes on why everyday materials behave the way they do: why glass is transparent, why metal feels cold, why ice floats, why water is wet. Evergreen curiosity science for non-experts. AI-generated and disclosed.

title: Christian Business Leadership | Watchpost Partners
author: Ashley
description:
Watchpost Partners | Christian Business & Leadership is a podcast for business owners, entrepreneurs, and leaders who want to honor God through their work. Hosted by Ashley Nutter, each episode combines biblical wisdom with practical leadership and business insights to help you lead with purpose, steward your time, talents, and resources faithfully, and build a business that impacts your community and glorifies Christ. 
Empowering Leaders. Strengthening Businesses. Impacting Communities.

title: LUCCI
author: Darren Baker
description:
LUCCI is a high-performance podcast about building wealth, discipline, and clarity through systems.
Host Darren Baker breaks down the operating principles behind execution, resilience, health, money, and relationships—without fluff.
Expect strategy you can apply immediately: mental models, personal operating systems, and real-world lessons on building a life with control and impact.
New episodes deliver actionable frameworks—and a challenge to level up your standards.

title: Learn Dutch with Alain
author: Learn Dutch with Alain
description: Learn Dutch with Alain offers Dutch lessons for beginners through advanced learners, including grammar, vocabulary, pronunciation, and exam prep. Visit https://learnanylanguages.com/dutch/private-dutch-lessons/ for lessons and companion resources.

title: MPCC Podcast: A Rural Community College
author: Mid-Plains Community College
description: Mid-Plains Community College, a two-year college in southwestern Nebraska, is more than just a place to learn, it’s a place where journeys begin. This podcast dives into the stories that make our community college unique, from students and faculty to alumni and local voices. Each episode highlights the experiences, opportunities, and connections that show why starting at a community college can be the smartest and most rewarding way to transform your future. Whether you're exploring your options or already part of the MPCC family, join us as we share what truly makes us unique.

title: The Love Jones Experience
author: Andre Romeo & Passionate P
description: The Love Jones Experience is where poetry, R&B, hip-hop, culture, and real conversations collide—hosted by a dynamic duo bringing raw perspectives, good energy, and authentic vibes to every episode. From hot topics and new music to independent artists and lifestyle talk, this is the space where creativity, connection, and culture meet.

title: Pioneers of a More Data Driven Union
author: Elder Research
description: Elder Research presents a series of interviews that spotlight government leaders who are leveraging technology and analytics to solve complex problems for the public good. The series is hosted by Christina Ho, VP of Government Analytics & Innovation at Elder Research. Christina has decades of broad experience in public finance, policy development, strategic planning, program and financial management, accounting and auditing, data analytics, and technology innovation. Elder Research is a data science consultancy with over 25 year of experience in hand-crafting innovative analytics solutions that inform decisions, deliver value, and transform organizations.

title: Everything in Life
author: Everything in Life
description: A podcast where we discussed everyone life.

title: Reformation Presbyterian Church Sermons
author: Joshua Roberts
description: Welcome to the sermon podcast of Reformation Presbyterian Church in Pike Road, Alabama. Our desire is to proclaim the whole counsel of God through faithful, Christ-centered exposition of the Scriptures. New sermons are added weekly following each Lord's Day service.

title: A Most Unpredictable Life
author: Jeremy Lewis
description: Jeremy Lewis wasn’t voted Most Talented. He wasn’t voted Best Looking. He definitely wasn’t voted Most Athletic.  He was voted Most Unpredictable — and his life has been proving it ever since.  A Most Unpredictable Life is a year‑by‑year storytelling podcast hosted by Jeremy and his good friend of eight years, Terry Lewis. Together they jump to a different year of Jeremy’s life each episode, piecing together a story that moves from a chaotic childhood — including a summer living in a van and motels — to cross‑country moves, five brothers, a $500 car headed for Chicago, Army Airborne School, deployments around the world, Tesla leadership, and even a flaming snowman operation that became campus legend.  Jeremy tells the stories. Terry opens the door, asks the questions, and keeps him honest — the kind of dynamic only two friends who genuinely enjoy each other can pull off.  One week you’re in 1992 cruising Ashland, Ohio in a ’65 Mustang with November Rain blasting. The next week you’re in 1973 learning where the story really began. Then you’re in Bosnia, Iraq, Afghanistan, or back in a Chicago dorm where military cadets accidentally start a campus legend.  It’s funny up front, real in the middle, and leaves you feeling good every time. A life that didn’t fit the usual superlatives ended up becoming one hell of a story.  If your life hasn’t gone in a straight line either, you’re in the right place.

title: Pastor Sherry Lupton Sunday Sermons
author: Shiloh Presbyterian Church
description:
Welcome to the Pastor Sherry Lupton Sermon Podcast, the weekly teaching ministry of Shiloh Presbyterian Church.

Each episode features the Sunday morning sermon from Pastor Sherry Lupton, thoughtfully condensed and presented to help you stay rooted in God's Word throughout the week. Whether you missed a service, want to revisit a message that spoke to your heart, or are looking for biblical encouragement on the go, these sermons are here to inspire, challenge, and strengthen your faith.

Join us as we explore Scripture, grow in Christ, and discover practical, hope-filled truths for everyday life.

"Faithfully proclaiming God's Word. Transforming lives through His grace."

title: Bomwin
author: bomwincapital
description: Bomwin - Các danh mục được sắp xếp khoa học giúp người dùng dễ dàng tiếp cận nội dung mong muốn chỉ với vài thao tác đơn giản. Hệ thống thường xuyên được bảo trì và nâng cấp để bổ sung các tiện ích mới, đồng thời cải thiện hiệu năng tổng thể. Điều này góp phần mang lại trải nghiệm giải trí liền mạch và thuận tiện trên nhiều thiết bị khác nhau. WEB: https://bomwin.capital/

title: BomWin
author: bomwinworks
description: BomWin - Hệ thống chú trọng xây dựng môi trường sử dụng an toàn với nhiều lớp bảo mật hiện đại nhằm bảo vệ thông tin cá nhân của người dùng. Dữ liệu được quản lý cẩn thận, hạn chế các rủi ro phát sinh trong quá trình truy cập. Ngoài ra, nền tảng còn áp dụng nhiều biện pháp kiểm tra và giám sát nhằm duy trì hiệu suất ổn định. Nhờ vậy, người dùng có thể yên tâm khám phá các nội dung giải trí và tận hưởng trải nghiệm WEB: https://bomwin.works/

title: The Overflow State
author: Heike Bitterle
description:
Remember that state where your ideas effortlessly drop in, your words flow through you, and you feel so alive and fulfilled by the work you get to do?
This creative inner state is not luck—it is your natural state. In this podcast, we are bringing your system home to it.
Hosted by Heike Bitterle, 2x solo female founder and former perfectionist sharing raw experiences & holding powerful convos to bring your inner and outer world to that state where creativity flows, visibility feels natural, and your impact grows steady and stable.
Hit subscribe. Let’s bring your system home.

title: What Comes Next with Arun
author: Arunansu Pattanayak
description: Most conversations about AI are either too technical for business leaders or too generic to be useful. What Comes Next with Arun fills that gap. Each episode translates real-world data and AI strategy into the language of competitive advantage — drawing on Arun’s 20+ years inside the world’s most complex enterprises, six years as a Microsoft Data & AI Executive, and his experience building Tipsora into a platform serving more than 95,000 professionals worldwide. This is not a podcast about AI tools. It is a podcast about building the organizational intelligence that makes tools matter.

title: Stoic Habits: Daily Mastery
description:
Unlock your inner resilience and cultivate a life of purpose. Stoic Habits: Daily Mastery delivers timeless wisdom for modern challenges.

This podcast is your daily guide to applying ancient Stoic philosophy to contemporary life. Discover practical habits for emotional regulation, rational decision-making, and finding tranquility amidst chaos. We distill the profound teachings of Seneca, Marcus Aurelius, and Epictetus into actionable strategies you can implement immediately.

New episodes arrive daily, Monday through Sunday, promptly at 8:00 AM. Each short, impactful episode focuses on a specific Stoic concept or exercise, designed to seamlessly integrate into your morning routine and set a powerful tone for your day.

Stoic Habits: Daily Mastery is for anyone seeking personal growth, mental fortitude, and a more fulfilling existence. If you're ready to transform your approach to stress, adversity, and everyday choices, this is your essential daily practice.

Subscribe now and start mastering your day, every day.

title: Still HER Beyond the Titles
author: Jasmine Quinnette
description: Still HER: Beyond the Titles is a podcast for the woman behind the roles. Hosted by Jasmine Quinnette, this space explores womanhood, identity, motherhood, marriage, growth, and rebuilding yourself beyond the expectations you carry. Through honest conversations and reflections, Still HER helps women reconnect with who they are beneath the titles. This isn’t about becoming someone new—it’s about rediscovering yourself, gently and honestly, one step at a time. Because beyond every role and responsibility… she’s still HER.

title: Eagle Hills Church Sermon Podcast
author: Brian
description: Weekly Sermons

title: Niños Anclados En Cristo
author: Stay Anchored Ministries
description: ¡Bienvenidos a **Niños Anclados en Cristo**!  Un podcast diseñado para ayudar a los niños y a sus familias a conocer toda la Biblia, fortalecer su fe y aprender a confiar en Dios en cada etapa de la vida.  En cada episodio recorreremos la Biblia en orden cronológico, desde Génesis hasta Apocalipsis, descubriendo las grandes historias, los personajes bíblicos y, sobre todo, el maravilloso plan de Dios para la humanidad.  También responderemos preguntas importantes de una manera sencilla y apropiada para niños, ayudándolos a entender no solo **qué** creen, sino también **por qué** lo creen.  Este podcast es perfecto para: • Devocionales en familia • Viajes en el automóvil • Educación en el hogar (homeschool) • Ministerios infantiles • Niños que desean crecer en su relación con Jesús  Nuestro deseo es levantar una nueva generación de niños firmemente anclados en la verdad de la Palabra de Dios, preparados para vivir su fe con amor, confianza y valentía.  ¡Acompáñanos en esta gran aventura por toda la Biblia!  **Niños Anclados en Cristo** es un ministerio de **Stay Anchored Ministries**.

title: Lexpo Talks
author: Hidde Bruinsma
description:
Lexpo Talks examines the ways technology is reshaping the legal profession. Host Ruben Havertz sits down with founders, general counsels and innovators who are redefining how lawyers think, work and lead in an era driven by AI.


The emphasis is on genuine experiences rather than buzz. Guests open up about what succeeds, what falls short and how legal teams can hold on to their humanity while preparing for what's next.

If you're curious about where law and technology actually intersect, this is where that conversation begins.


Want me to try a few alternative tones as well for example a punchier, shorter version or a more formal one?

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: REAL CHRISTIANITY TODAY
author: Emmanuel & Chizoba
description: Real Christianity Today Podcast is a place we have authentic, honest, Scripture-centered conversations about what it really means to follow Christ in today's world. This is for modern Christians who want to navigate today's culture while staying rooted in biblical truth.

title: Anchored with Heather Moon Vogels
author: Heather Moon Vogels
description:
Conversations about identity, transition, finding steadiness through change and what it means to be whole - with psychologist, trauma therapist and rower Heather Moon Vogels.
Anchored is for anyone navigating a major life transition — whether that’s life after elite sport, becoming a mother, moving countries, or simply asking who you are when your context changes completely. Psychologist, trauma therapist, and former competitive rower Heather Moonvogels brings together the worlds of high performance and trauma-informed healing — exploring identity, nervous system regulation.

title: JuJuBabyWorld
author: JuJuBaby
description: Bay Area Music Artist talking about life and music.

title: The Ashley Hepperly Podcast
author: Ashley Hepperly & Rooted Collective
description:
Hey, I’m Ashley!


I’m just out here trying to help others walk deeply with Jesus and have adventure with God by knowing his wild love. 


And I have a ministry called Rooted Collective where we do just that. 


There's a way not many choose--a hidden way--where the deepest healing happens beneath the surface, in the roots of the heart.

This spot is for heart healing, authentic community, and raw conversations about walking with God in intimacy, identity, and wholeness…and well, some storytelling and fun. 

Do you long to dig into the deep parts of God? To be fully alive in Jesus from the inside out, truly living in radical love? If so, this is your invitation.


Hang out with me here virtually in the Great Smoky Mountains of East Tennessee. I'll sometimes bring friends on to talk about healing the heart and experiencing God together. See you on the inside:)

title: Ambient Alleys
author: Katrin Chisholm
description: Unwind with our latest sleep podcast and tranquil tales designed to help you drift into serenity. Explore stories that ease your mind and nurture quiet moments.

title: The World Cup Podcast
author: Castro z
description:
Welcome to The World Cup Podcast: The Ultimate Guide, your absolute front-row seat to the biggest sporting event on the planet.
Every single episode, we are breaking down the beautiful game like no one else. We're talking tactical masterclasses, heartbreaking upsets, and the incredible, untold stories of the players who bleed for their colors.From group-stage chaos to the dramatic tension of a penalty shootout, we've got you covered with sharp analysis, bold predictions, and the global fan culture that makes this tournament magic.

title: Reel for Real - Behind the Scenes
author: Sonia W Kohli
description:
Real stories beyond the reel.
Reel for Real – Behind the Scenes is a podcast exploring identity, perception and the realities behind what we see and perceive.
Created and hosted by Sonia W Kohli, the series goes beyond surface-level conversations to explore the person behind the image, the confidence, the success, the smile and the stories we don’t always see.
Produced by Kunishka Productions.

title: Inspiring Entrepreneurs
author: Podplistic
description:
The Inspiring Entrepreneurs Podcast brings you insightful conversations with entrepreneurs and thought leaders from diverse industries in Scotland and beyond. Join us as we dive into the challenges, successes, and hot topics currently shaping the world of entrepreneurship. Whether you’re a curious citizen, an experienced practitioner, or a political actor, we’ll provide you with real-world inspiration to fuel your journey.

 

Brought to you by Strathclyde Inspire at the University of Strathclyde, Scotland – supporting entrepreneurship in all its forms. Find out more: www.strath.ac.uk/workwithus/strathclydeinspire/

title: Eurth Deep Dive
author: Eurth Worldbuilding and Roleplay Writing Community
description:
Eurth Deep Dive is a podcast that dives into the collaborative roleplaying conworld called of Eurth.
Join our hosts, Momerator and Dadmin, as they explore its nations and cultures, analyse major events from geopolitics and history, and uncover the stories behind our ever-evolving worldbuilding project.
Whether you're an Eurth player or a curious worldbuilding enthusiast, this Eurth Deep Dive offers fascinating insights into our collaborative storytelling and fictional world creation.
For more information, visit https://eurth.org
— Eurth Worldbuilding and Roleplay Writing Community

title: Life Without A Clue
author: KeKe and Nikki
description: A witty, hilarious, serious, emotional, and informative podcast shedding light on Millennials navigating through life without a clue. There’s no blueprint or handbooks on this journey, just life lessons and experiences molding us into who we’re destined to be.

title: CHAMBER MODE PODCAST
author: Four Chambers Media
description: Come Listen To Unheard of Stories, Messy Stories, Weird and Cringe stories right Here!!!!

title: The Guess What Podcast
author: Troy and Larissa
description:
The Guess What Podcast brings you hilarious story times, real conversations, and the “wait, WHAT?” moments of adult life, all told from two sides of the same situation.
It’s relatable, chaotic, honest, and the perfect mix of comedy and connection!

title: Outrigger Tour
author: Outrigger Outdoors
description: Outrigger Tour takes you behind the scenes with guides, captains, hunters, anglers, and outdoor industry leaders who live the outdoor lifestyle. From bowfishing, flounder gigging, and bully netting to duck hunting, predator hunting, airboats, gear, and conservation, each episode features real conversations, expert tips, and authentic stories from the people who know it best. Real people. Real stories. Real outdoors.

title: The Gear Up Podcast
author: Erin White
description:
After 15+ years of coaching fastpitch softball catchers, one thing became clear: no catcher’s journey should be ever built on guesswork. Yet every day, too many catchers, parents, and coaches are left to navigate the hardest position on the field without a clear, proven path forward.
The Gear Up Podcast was created to change that.
Every week, we help catchers, parents, and coaches stop guessing, stop crossing their fingers, and start developing with purpose.
Hosted by Coach Erin White, founder of Gear Up Catching, each episode is designed to help you better understand what really goes into developing great catchers through practical coaching, proven strategies, and honest conversations.
Whether you’re learning the position for the first time, supporting your daughter’s softball journey, or coaching the next generation of catchers, you’ll gain practical tools you can put into action immediately.
Inside the show, we’ll cover everything from catching training, skill development, game management, and softball IQ to leadership, mindset, communication, recruiting, total athlete development, and what it truly takes to become the complete catcher.
Drawing from more than 15 years of coaching experience, a Master’s Degree in Education and Curriculum Design, and a track record of helping more than 1,500 catchers develop their game, Coach Erin shares the same philosophies and proven systems she has used throughout her coaching career. Those same principles have helped 100% of graduating Gear Up athletes who pursued college softball go on to successfully achive their dreams of playing at the next level, while earning nearly $7 million in scholarship opportunities.
This podcast goes beyond tips for building elite catchers.
It’s about developing the entire catcher, and the human behind the gear.
One who is confident behind the plate, leads with courage, competes with purpose, and carries those lessons far beyond the game.
Our mission is simple: to equip catchers, parents, and coaches with the knowledge, tools, and confidence to develop confident catchers, fearless leaders behind the plate, and warriors for life.

title: IT Corner
description:
IT Corner Podcast, is our YouTube channel for the IT podcasts
What can you expect from our podcast?
- Monthly podcast with new guests from the IT industry 
- Inspiration topics and motivation thoughts
- TOP trends in the IT technology
- How to start your IT career 
Separate series related to different topics and categories
- Playlist with a full podcast

title: Playing the Long Game
author: Yusuf Bodiat
description: Playing the Long Game. Yusuf Bodiat — CFO, author of The Bottom Line, and founder of Pragmatic Thinking — on how serious decisions get made, why most strategy fails, and what long-term thinking actually looks like in business, leadership, and finance. Season 1 launching soon.

title: Scaling Trust with Matt Tidwell
author: Matt Tidwell
description: Scaling Trust is a show about what it actually takes to build durable relationships between companies and their customers — beyond the handoff, beyond onboarding, and into the kind of trust that drives expansion and advocacy.

title: Mic'd and Messy
author: Travis Conway and Jonnie Hubbard
description: Mic’d and Messy is a podcast that dives into honest, unfiltered conversations about navigating the nonprofit world. Each episode explores the real challenges behind mission-driven work—fundraising, burnout, leadership, limited resources, and impact while also highlighting the messy, unpredictable, and human side of making a difference. It’s a space for candid insights, lessons learned, and practical strategies from people working on the front lines of change.

title: Code, Cells and the Golden State
author: Metric Bio
description:
This is Code, Cells and the Golden State, a brand new podcast from Nick Mahoney focussing on innovation in California within Digital Health, Biotech and MedTech.
Each episode will feature a prominent leader in the space, discussing ground-breaking innovations and some of the most cutting-edge solutions currently coming out of the Golden State.

title: THE WORLD'S BEST PREACHER
author: JAKES T_D
description: Welcome to "the world's best preacher" This is a space for healing, restoration, and stepping into the purpose God placed in you. Like Bishop T.D. Jakes says, it’s time to move past your pain and into your power. We talk faith, real life, relationships, and that inner instinct God gave you to win. You’re not broken. You’re being built. Tune in, and don’t drop the mic on your destiny.

title: B52club
author: b52clubwebsite
description: B52club - Đội ngũ hỗ trợ luôn sẵn sàng tiếp nhận các thắc mắc và phản hồi từ người dùng thông qua nhiều kênh liên hệ khác nhau. Mọi yêu cầu đều được xử lý với tinh thần chuyên nghiệp, hướng đến việc giải quyết nhanh chóng và hiệu quả. Ngoài việc hỗ trợ kỹ thuật, nền tảng còn cung cấp các hướng dẫn chi tiết giúp người mới dễ dàng làm quen với giao diện cũng như các tính năng hiện có. WEB: https://b52club.website/

title: MACWEALTH AUDIOBOOKS
author: Isaiah Macwealth
description:
Macwealth Audiobooks is the official audiobook podcast of Prophet Isaiah Macwealth, featuring powerful Christian audiobooks, biblical teachings, devotionals, and faith-building messages designed to deepen your relationship with God.


Listen to bestselling Christian books, including The Morning Altar Warrior, along with teachings on prayer, spiritual warfare, the Holy Spirit, revival, healing, kingdom living, leadership, and Christian discipleship.


Whether you're praying, commuting, or studying God's Word, each episode is created to inspire spiritual growth, strengthen your faith, and equip you to live a victorious Christian life.


Subscribe today and experience the transforming power of God's Word—one chapter at a time.

title: HAVANA SYNDROME IS HERE
author: HSIH
description:
Thank you for listening. On this podcast, every idea, every question, and every logical inference is crucial.
Havana Syndrome is here in the United States, and it’s happening to ordinary people too - like myself, for 5 years now.
Havana Syndrome is one of the biggest Civil and Constitutional rights issue in a long time.

title: Bible (Fenton) NT 06-27: Romans to Revelation, The by Ferrar Fenton Bible
description:
Work on the translation began in 1853 by a London businessman named Ferrar Fenton (1832–1920). The complete Bible was first published in 1903, though parts were published as separate volumes during the preceding 11 years. The translation is noted for a rearranging of the books of the Bible into what the author believed was the correct chronological order. In the Old Testament, this order follows that of the Hebrew Bible. The name of God was translated throughout the Old Testament as "The Ever-Living". The Bible is described as "translated into English direct from the original Hebrew, Chaldee, and Greek languages." For his translation of the Book of Job which appeared in 1898, Fenton was assisted by Henrik Borgström. This was "rendered into the same metre as the original Hebrew, word by word and line by line". His translation of the New Testament is based on the Greek text of Westcott and Hort. The ordering novelty in the New Testament is that it places the Gospel of John and the First Epistle of John at the beginning before the Gospel of Matthew, thus placing the Acts of the Apostles immediately after the Gospel of Luke.

Notable as well, is Ferrar Fenton's restoration of the Psalms into the musical verse form as close to the original as he could get. The Psalms were, quite literally, songs, complete with instructions for the "choirmaster" as well as descriptions of the appropriate musical instruments to be used. Today Psalm 48, Psalm 137, and Psalm 23 are still sung in churches, albeit to tunes not the original. (Summary by Wikipedia)

The translation is noted for a rearranging of the books of the Bible into what the author believed was the correct chronological order. In the Old Testament, this order follows that of the Hebrew Bible. The name of God was translated throughout the Old Testament as "The Ever-Living". The Bible is described as "translated into English direct from the original Hebrew, Chaldee, and Greek languages." For his translation of the Book of Job which appeared in 1898, Fenton was assisted by Henrik Borgström. This was "rendered into the same metre as the original Hebrew, word by word and line by line". His translation of the New Testament is based on the Greek text of Westcott and Hort. The ordering novelty in the New Testament is that it places the Gospel of John and the First Epistle of John at the beginning before the Gospel of Matthew, thus placing the Acts of the Apostles immediately after the Gospel of Luke.

Notable as well, is Ferrar Fenton's restoration of the Psalms into the musical verse form as close to the original as he could get. The Psalms were, quite literally, songs, complete with instructions for the "choirmaster" as well as descriptions of the appropriate musical instruments to be used. Today Psalm 48, Psalm 137, and Psalm 23 are still sung in churches, albeit to tunes not the original. (Summary from Wikipedia)

title: Bible (Fenton) 08, 13-14, 16-22, 25, 27: Holy Bible in Modern English, The: Psalms to 2 Chronicles b
description:
The Holy Bible in Modern English, commonly known as the Ferrar Fenton Bible, was one of the earliest translations of the Bible into "modern English" (i.e., English as spoken and written in the 19th and 20th centuries).

Work on the translation was begun in 1853 by a London businessman named Ferrar Fenton (1832–1920). The complete Bible was first published in 1903, though parts were published as separate volumes during the preceding 11 years. Fenton spent approximately fifty years working on his translation, with his sole goal 'to study the Bible absolutely in its original languages, to ascertain what its writers actually said and thought'. Fenton had acquired a great learning and understanding of ancient Sanskrit, Greek, Hebrew and Latin through being a distinguished member of the Royal Asiatic Society. As a tradesman he also had access to numerous ancient Septuagint and Masoretic manuscripts to aid in his translation, and he also used Brian Walton's Polygot Bible (1657) for minimal referencing.

The translation is noted for a rearranging of the books of the Bible into what Fenton believed was the correct chronological order. In the Old Testament, this order follows that of the Hebrew Bible. The name of God was translated throughout the Old Testament as "The EVER-LIVING", but to a lesser degree as "LORD" and to a much lesser degree as "JEHOVAH" (such as in Numbers chapter 15). The Bible is described as "translated into English direct from the original Hebrew, Chaldee, and Greek languages."

Notable as well, is Ferrar Fenton's restoration of the Psalms into the musical verse form as close to the original as he could get. The Psalms were, quite literally, songs, complete with instructions for the "choirmaster" as well as descriptions of the appropriate musical instruments to be used. Today Psalm 48, Psalm 137, and Psalm 23 are still sung in churches, albeit to tunes not the original. Summary by Wikipedia.

title: Bible (DRV) Apocrypha/Deuterocanon: Wisdom of Sirach (Ecclesiasticus) by Douay-Rheims Version (DRV)
description: The Book of Ecclesiasticus is preceded by a prologue which professes to be the work of the Greek translator of the original Hebrew and the genuineness of which is undoubted. In this preface to his translation, the writer describes how he was deeply impressed by the wisdom of the sayings and so wished by his translation to place those valuable teachings within the reach of anyone desiring to live in a more perfect accord with the law of God. The fundamental thought of the author is that of wisdom as understood and inculcated in inspired Hebrew literature. The contents may be divided into two great parts: chs. i-xlii, 14; and xlii, 15-1, 26. The sayings which chiefly make up the first part, tend directly to inculcate the fear of God and the fulfillment of His commands, wherein consists true wisdom. This they do by pointing out, in a concrete manner, how the truly wise man shall conduct himself in the manifold relationships of practical life. Together with these maxims, which resemble closely both in matter and form the Proverbs of Solomon, the first part includes several more or less long descriptions of the origin and excellence of wisdom. The contents of the second part, at first describe at length the Divine wisdom so wonderfully displayed in the realm of nature (xlii, 15-xliii), and next illustrate the practice of wisdom in the various walks of life, as made known by the history of Israel's worthies, from Enoch down to the high priest Simon, the writer's holy contemporary (xliv-1, 26). At the close of the book, there is first, a short conclusion containing the author's subscription and the express declaration of his general purpose; and next, an appendix (li) in which the writer returns thanks to God for His benefits, and especially for the gift of wisdom and to which are subjoined in the Hebrew text recently discovered, a second subscription and the following pious ejaculation: "Blessed be the name of Yahweh from this time forth and for evermore." ( The Catholic Encyclopedia (1909) - condensed by ancientchristian)

title: An Post Tracking: The Complete Guide to
description:
Waiting for an important parcel can be stressful, especially when you don't know where it is. Fortunately, An Post Tracking makes it easy to follow your shipment from dispatch to delivery. Whether you're expecting an online purchase, mailing important documents, or receiving an international package.

An Post provides reliable tracking tools that keep you informed every step of the way.As Ireland's national postal operator, An Post handles millions of letters and parcels each year, offering dependable domestic and international delivery services. With its online Track & Trace system and mobile app, customers can check delivery progress anytime and from anywhere.

For More infor https://anposttracking.org/

How to Track Your An Post ParcelChecking the status of your parcel is quick and straightforward.Simply follow these steps:
  1. Open the official An Post Track & Trace page.
  2. Enter your tracking number into the search field.
  3. Click the Track button.
  4. Review the latest delivery status and scan history.
Tracking information is refreshed whenever your parcel is scanned at a sorting centre, customs facility, delivery depot, or during the final delivery process.Understanding An Post Tracking NumbersEvery tracked shipment receives a unique tracking code that follows the international Universal Postal Union (UPU) S10 standard.A typical tracking number looks like this:RR123456789IEThe tracking number consists of:
  • Two letters identifying the service type
  • Nine numerical digits
  • A two-letter country code
Some common tracking prefixes include:
  • R – Registered Mail
  • E – Express Mail Service (EMS)
  • C – Parcel Post
  • L – Letter Post
  • A – Tracked Letter Services
For parcels originating outside Ireland, the last two letters indicate the country where the shipment was posted instead of IE.Common An Post Tracking Statuses ExplainedTracking updates provide valuable information about your parcel's location and delivery progress.Item Details ReceivedThe sender has created the shipping information, but the parcel has not yet been handed over to An Post.Item Received by An PostYour shipment has entered the An Post network and is being prepared for processing.In TransitThe parcel is travelling between sorting facilities on its way to the destination.Out for DeliveryYour package has been loaded onto the delivery vehicle and is expected to arrive that day.DeliveredThe shipment has been successfully delivered to the recipient's address.Delivery AttemptedA delivery was attempted but could not be completed because nobody was available or another issue prevented delivery.Held at CustomsInternational parcels may be temporarily delayed while customs authorities inspect the shipment or process any applicable duties and taxes.Domestic and International Parcel TrackingAn Post offers tracking for both local and overseas deliveries.Domestic DeliveriesWithin Ireland, customers receive regular tracking updates as parcels move through sorting centres and delivery offices. Most domestic deliveries arrive within one or two working days, depending on the postal service selected.International DeliveriesInternational tracking continues throughout the shipment's journey. While the parcel remains in Ireland, updates are provided by An Post. After leaving the country, tracking information is supplied by the postal operator in the destination country until delivery is completed.Why Your Tracking May Stop UpdatingIt's common for customers to become concerned when tracking information doesn't change for a few days. In many situations, this is completely normal.Tracking updates only appear when a parcel is scanned at key checkpoints. During transportation between facilities, there may be no new scans available.Common reasons for delayed updates include:
  • Weekend transportation
  • Public holidays
  • Customs inspections
  • Severe weather conditions
  • Increased parcel volumes during busy shopping seasons
If your parcel remains unchanged well beyond its expected delivery date, it's advisable to contact the sender or An Post customer support.Customs for International ShipmentsParcels arriving in Ireland from countries outside the European Union may be subject to customs clearance.Depending on the shipment's value and contents, VAT, customs duties, or administrative charges may need to be paid before delivery can continue.To avoid unnecessary delays, ensure your contact details are accurate so you can receive customs notifications promptly.What Happens After a Missed Delivery?If no one is available to receive your parcel, An Post will usually leave a delivery notice explaining your available options.You may be able to:
  • Collect your parcel from the local delivery office.
  • Arrange another delivery attempt.
  • Redirect the parcel if the service is available.
Parcels are generally held for a limited period before being returned to the sender.Benefits of the An Post Mobile AppThe official An Post app makes parcel management even easier.Key features include:
  • Live tracking updates
  • Push notifications
  • Parcel management
  • Customs payment options
  • Delivery preferences
  • Safe place instructions
Using the app means you can monitor your deliveries without repeatedly visiting the tracking website.Tips for a Smooth Delivery ExperienceTo help ensure your parcel arrives without delays, remember to:
  • Verify your tracking number carefully.
  • Include the correct Eircode on every Irish address.
  • Check tracking updates regularly.
  • Respond promptly to customs requests.
  • Keep your contact information up to date.
These simple steps can significantly reduce delivery issues.When Should You Contact An Post?You should consider contacting customer support if:
  • Tracking has not updated for several days beyond the estimated delivery date.
  • Your parcel is marked as delivered but cannot be located.
  • The tracking number is invalid or not recognised.
  • Customs payment issues are preventing delivery.
  • Your shipment appears lost or damaged.
Having your tracking number available will help customer support investigate your shipment more quickly.Frequently Asked QuestionsHow often does An Post tracking update?Tracking information is updated whenever your parcel is scanned during processing or delivery.

Can international parcels be tracked?Yes. Most international shipments can be tracked using the same tracking number throughout their journey, depending on the destination country's postal service.What does "Item Details Received" mean?It means the sender has created the shipping label, but An Post has not yet received the physical parcel.

Does An Post deliver parcels on Saturdays?Saturday deliveries depend on the postal service selected and the delivery location.What should I do if my parcel is delayed?Check your tracking information, verify your tracking number, wait for the next scan, and contact the sender or An Post if the parcel exceeds the expected delivery timeframe.

Final ThoughtsAn Post Tracking offers a convenient and reliable way to monitor parcels from dispatch through to delivery. Whether you're sending important documents within Ireland or waiting for an overseas purchase, the tracking system provides valuable updates that help you stay informed.

NGSS, phenomenon-based learning, and the honest conversations the science education world needs to have.

No scripts. No edits. Let's get to work.

author: Dr. Calvin Flemons

Faith, Pharmacy, and Black Excellence!

"Let's Change The World One Soul At A Time"

title: Sweeenie’s Take
author: sweeniestake
description: Sweeenie's Take. Raw. Live. Completely Independent.

title: Victim Justice Unveiled
author: Tamara Musolino
description: Victim Justice Unveiled is a survivor‑centered true‑crime and justice‑system podcast covering every stage—from unfiled cases and investigations to prosecution, sentencing, appeals, and parole. Created by paralegal and supervising victim advocate Tamara Musolino, VJU uses the GPS model—Guide, Process, Support—to explain victim rights, legal navigation, and justice reform through real cases and trauma‑informed conversations.

title: Spirit-Led Mama | Emotional, Regulation, Present Mom, God’s Peace, Biblical Encouragement, Motherhood
author: Jonetta Alberta - Spirit-Led Mama, Bible Teacher, Guide to Grounded Motherhood
description:
Are you tired of overreacting to your kids in the moment and then drowning in guilt afterwards because you yelled again? Lying in bed at night wondering what kind of mother you were today? Have you been trying your best but still feel like you’re falling short? Do you wish you could be present, peaceful, and intentional with your family?
Friend, this podcast is for you. 
The Spirit-Led Mama is where overwhelmed and reactive moms get grounded in God, break free from guilt, and learn to show up intentionally in motherhood. Every episode will bring you biblical truth, honest conversation, and practical tools to help you stop striving, find your footing, and grow into the mom God created you to be. 
Because guilt isn’t the problem - its the symptom. Lasting change doesn’t come from trying harder- it comes from remembering who God says you are. 
I’m Jonetta Alberta — and I know that cycle because I lived it. The fatigue. The rushing. The reacting. The yelling and fussing over everything and nothing at the same time. The ”I’ll do better tomorrow” that never quite came. 
I wasn’t failing because I didn’t love my kids — I was failing because I didn’t know who I was. The moment I discovered my identity in Christ, began healing what was keeping me stuck, and stopped trying to lead motherhood in my own strength, everything changed. I went from reactive and emotionally overwhelmed to grounded,, intentional, and Spirit-led. 
And mama, it can change for you too..
So if you’re ready to get grounded in God, break the guilt cycle, and show up intentionally in motherhood, hit subscribe and come home. Because the Spirit-led mama your family has been waiting for? She’s already inside you.
Grab your favorite cup of coffee or tea, open your Bible and your heart, and let’s wake her up. 🤍

title: Echoes of the Missing
author: Jamie
description:
When someone goes missing, the world keeps turning.
But their loved ones are left behind in a silence no family should ever have to endure — a silence filled with questions, grief, and the ache of not knowing.
This is Echoes of the Missing.
And here, we do more than interrupt that silence.
We make sure their stories are not only told, but echoed, until answers are found.

title: The Rustlers of Pecos County: Love and Law in Texas
description: In the heart of Pecos County, the town of Linrock is gripped by fear as a ruthless gang of rustlers wreaks havoc. As chaos unfolds, two Texas Lone Star Rangers arrive, determined to restore order. Their mission becomes complicated when they find themselves drawn to two captivating women, who may hold ties to the very criminals they seek to capture. Can these steadfast lawmen balance their duty to uphold the law with their growing affections? 'Rustlers of Pecos County' weaves a gripping narrative of loyalty, romance, and the challenges of justice in the Wild West. Join the Rangers on their journey through danger, love, and tough choices in a town where right and wrong blur. This classic tale by Zane Grey highlights the struggles faced by those who fight for what's right while navigating the complexities of the heart.

title: CFO Unplugged
author: Crystal Haight
description: This podcast is from a trained bookkeeper, turned accountant, and then a financial coach. Crystal's experience led her to help business owners live the lifestyle that's been marketed, promoted, and all the sacrifices, but she saw a gap. In all her experiences, she wants to help in the best way she can, and that's by showing her clients how to create positive cash flow across everything the business does.

title: THE COLLECTIVE
author: The Collective Group
description:
A flight crew community built on precision, teamwork, and trust.
Critical care transport, safety, and leadership — from the pad to the patient.

author: Aaron Toledano
description: Shalom bayis

title: Built to Belong Podcast
author: Stephanie
description: You don’t have to fit in to succeed. Built to Belong shares the inspiring stories of women who are proving every day that passion, resilience, and hard work belong in every industry.

title: Divas On Call
author: Divas On Call
description: Hosted by the Aesthetic Diva (George Corpuz MD) and the Metacarpal Diva (Khusboo Desai MD), Divas on Call is where a plastic surgery resident and orthopedic hand surgeon dive into life, aesthetics, fashion, culture, and unapologetically being a diva. By day (and often by midnight), we're in the operating room. Off the clock, we're reclaiming and rebranding what it means to be a diva. Being a diva isn't about demanding attention. It's about being yourself when everyone else is telling you that you're "too much". So scrub in, stay fabulous, and stay on call.

title: Max Lucado Daily Sermons
author: Ola Rasheed
description: Max Lucado Daily Sermons brings you inspiring, Bible-centered messages filled with hope, grace, and practical wisdom for everyday life. Be encouraged through Christ-centered teaching that strengthens your faith and helps you grow in your walk with God.

title: Strong Poison: A Lord Peter Wimsey Mystery
description: In 'Strong Poison,' the renowned detective Lord Peter Wimsey faces one of his most puzzling cases yet. A woman sits on trial for murder, accused of poisoning her fiancé. As the evidence mounts against her, Wimsey believes in her innocence and is determined to find the real killer. This classic detective story weaves together intricate clues, clever dialogue, and a deep dive into human motives. Listeners will be drawn into a world of suspense, where every character has a secret and every twist keeps you guessing. With themes of love, betrayal, and justice, Sayers crafts a riveting tale that explores the complexities of the human heart. Experience the thrill of the chase as Wimsey uncovers hidden truths and battles societal expectations. Perfect for fans of classic mysteries and anyone who enjoys a well-crafted whodunit, 'Strong Poison' promises to keep you engaged from start to finish.

title: Critical Bromance
author: Critical Bromance
description: Critical Bromance follows four “bros” (and by bros, we mean anyone, it’s about spirit, not gender) who find themselves at a crossroads in life. After hearing life-changing news, they make a pact to stop drifting and start chasing the futures they’ve always dreamed of, together. It’s a mix of humor, heartfelt storytelling, and high-stakes adventure, more than just another actual-play D&D podcast, it’s about rolling the dice on life itself.

title: The Golden Web: Deception in High Places
description: Stirling Deane, a once struggling miner, strikes it rich after selling the Little Anna Gold Mine in South Africa. As the new head of the company, he enjoys a life of wealth and status. But his world turns upside down when an old acquaintance arrives, claiming to possess the original deed to the mine. This shocking revelation sets off a chain of events that leads to betrayal and murder. After a tense meeting with Deane, the acquaintance is found dead, and the deed he claimed to hold has vanished. As Deane navigates a web of lies and danger, he must uncover the truth behind the murder and protect his newfound fortune. This gripping crime mystery dives deep into themes of greed, trust, and the lengths people will go to for power. Join the suspenseful journey as hidden motives unravel and the stakes rise higher than ever.

title: Your Presence IS Your Impact
author: Anese Cavanaugh
description: Your presence impacts... everything. It is either costing you or strengthening you. It's easy (but hard) to miss. Free to change. And invaluable to tend to. In all areas. A podcast with Anese Cavanaugh, creator of the IEP Method®, author of Contagious You and Contagious Culture, vitality and alignment coach, leadership and culture advisor with over 30 years of experience in the trenches, and lover of the human spirit. We're talking all things presence and impact: what it takes, who it's for, what we need, what gets in our way, and how to do it and be it authentically (for real). From alignment to vitality to spirituality to culture to collaboration to creativity to leadership, and from work to home, nothing is off-limits or unaffected by your presence.

title: Unapologetically Biblical
author: Faith Jordan; Hannah Williams
description:
Unapologetically Biblical is a podcast dedicated to studying Scripture and exploring theology with clarity, depth, and faithfulness.
In a world filled with competing voices and shifting ideas, we return to the foundation of God’s Word. Each episode seeks to open the Bible carefully, allowing Scripture to interpret Scripture and speak into truth, faith, and everyday life.
Join us as we pursue a deeper understanding of God’s Word—unapologetically and faithfully.

title: The House of Thorne Podcast
author: R. Adrian Thorne
description:
The House of Thorne is a curated collection of queer fiction where bisexual men come of age, come undone, and sometimes come back for more.😈

houseofthorne.substack.com

title: The Herapath Property: A Mysterious Death
description: Jacob Herapath, a prominent property developer and member of Parliament, is discovered dead in his office, a revolver resting beside him and a bullet wound in his head. As investigators delve into the case, the discovery of a suspiciously forged Will raises the stakes. Who stands to gain from Jacob's untimely demise? This gripping tale weaves through layers of deception, revealing family secrets and hidden motives. With each twist, listeners will find themselves drawn deeper into a web of intrigue, where nothing is as it seems. Experience the thrill of unraveling a complex mystery filled with unexpected turns and unforgettable characters. Join the journey to uncover the truth behind Jacob Herapath's death and the dark secrets of those who surrounded him.

title: Small Worlds
author: Joe Babauta
description: A little bit of everything.

title: Pure Wellness Miami
author: Pure Wellness Miami
description: The immense weight of my past choices, the profound shame rooted in the molestation of my own children, the years lost to meth addiction, and the undeniable failure of WVC Wellness that screwed over countless individuals, casts a long, skeptical shadow over Pure Wellness Miami, my latest venture. Despite my public lamentations of a broken heart and a desperate yearning for redemption through Jesus, and grappling daily with financial destitution and an inescapable criminal record for incest, molestation, and serious drug use, the specter of my history makes it incredibly difficult for anyone to view my new business endeavors without profound apprehension. I plead for a chance to prove my sincerity in striving for a life worthy of forgiveness, yet that plea is starkly contrasted by the persistent question of whether my current undertakings truly represent a clean slate, or merely another attempt to navigate my dire circumstances with the same questionable judgment that defined my ruinous past.

title: The Genius: A Journey Through Ambition
description: In 'Genius,' Theodore Dreiser reveals a deeply personal story that explores the tumultuous relationship between creativity and desire. This semi-autobiographical novel delves into the life of an aspiring artist grappling with his ambitions and the complexities of human connection. Dreiser's candid portrayal of sexual urges and emotional struggles offers a raw look at the often painful path to artistic success. Over four years, he meticulously crafted this narrative, making it the work closest to his heart. Listeners will discover how the protagonist's quest for recognition leads to moments of profound insight and conflict. 'Genius' challenges us to consider the sacrifices made in the name of art and the price of honesty in a world that often shuns vulnerability. Join Dreiser on this poignant exploration of the human spirit, where the pursuit of greatness collides with the realities of life.

Each episode we open Scripture together and explore the beautiful process of resting in God’s love while becoming more like Jesus. You are beloved. Becoming flows from that place.

title: The Courage to Go Podcast
author: Enda Jones
description:
Life doesn't always unfold the way we planned. Whether you're navigating a career transition, a season of waiting, a difficult decision, or simply wondering what God is doing, **The Courage to Go Podcast** helps women discover who they are in Christ, discern where God is leading them, and find the courage to take their next faithful step.
Each week, Enda Jones shares honest stories, biblical encouragement, and practical conversations to help you trust God more deeply and walk confidently in His direction.
Because God changes your direction by first transforming your identity.

title: The BRB Podcast

description: Faith. Is. Required. We have to get up and do something. Here, we get to look at what walking with Jesus really looks like. SPOILER, it is not easy, but it sure is beautiful! title: Remote Dental VAs
author: harrisonmich210@gmail.com
description:
Welcome to the Remote Dental VAs Podcast, the show dedicated to helping dental practice owners, office managers, and healthcare entrepreneurs build more efficient, profitable, and stress-free practices.

Hosted by industry experts and featuring insights from dentists, practice leaders, and virtual support professionals, each episode explores practical strategies for streamlining operations, improving patient communication, increasing treatment acceptance, and reducing administrative overload through the power of specialized Dental Virtual Assistants.

Whether you're struggling with staffing shortages, overwhelmed by insurance follow-ups, trying to improve scheduling efficiency, or looking for ways to scale your practice without increasing overhead, this podcast delivers actionable advice you can implement right away.

You'll discover topics including:

  • How Dental Virtual Assistants improve practice efficiency
  • Front desk optimization and patient communication
  • Insurance verification, billing, and accounts receivable best practices
  • Scheduling systems that reduce no-shows
  • Growing your dental practice with remote team members
  • Leadership, productivity, and workflow optimization
  • The future of AI and technology in dentistry
  • Success stories from dentists using Remote Dental VAs

Remote Dental VAs was founded by Dr. Angela Leung, an experienced endodontist who understands the daily challenges dental practices face. By combining trained Dental Virtual Assistants, modern technology, and innovative workflows, Remote Dental VAs helps practices save time, reduce stress, improve patient care, and focus on what matters most creating healthier smiles.

Whether you're a solo practitioner, multi-location practice, or growing dental organization, this podcast provides the insights and tools to help your team work smarter and your practice thrive.

Subscribe today and discover how Remote Dental VAs is transforming the future of dental practice management one episode at a time.

title: Super NintenBros Podcast
author: Jonah Clark
description:
Two grown adults seriously overanalyze plumbers, turtles, mushrooms, and 40 years of Nintendo chaos.
Super NintenBros dives into Mario lore, Nintendo history, ridiculous fan theories, retro gaming nostalgia, and the games that shaped an entire generation.

title: The Imaginal Field
author: Cynthia Rose
description:
The Imaginal Field is a podcast and blog for seekers, creatives, & quietly rebellious people who can feel the old stories loosening and something truer emerging.
Through short audio flares and unfiltered reflections, Cynthia Rose explores resonance, conscious evolution, embodiment, and how to live awake in a world built to keep you distracted - without bypassing the body, the heart, or the raw intelligence of lived experience.
This isn’t motivation. It’s a recalibration. 
Brief, potent episodes are meant to be felt.
Enter the field. Listen. Remember what you already know. 
FlareWriter.com

title: Gold: The California Gold Rush
description: In the heart of the California Gold Rush of 1849, four friends embark on a daring adventure to strike it rich. Their journey takes them from the bustling streets of San Francisco to the wild terrains of the gold fields, crossing the treacherous isthmus of Panama along the way. As they search for fortune, they face fierce challenges: hostile encounters with Native Americans, run-ins with desperate outlaws, and the unforgiving forces of nature. Each twist and turn reveals not just the perils of their quest but also the strength of their friendship and the resilience of the human spirit. Will they find the gold they seek, or will their dreams be buried in the dust? Join these brave adventurers as they navigate not just the physical landscape, but the emotional highs and lows of their quest. Discover the true cost of ambition, camaraderie, and the relentless pursuit of dreams in this gripping tale of adventure.

title: Inspired by a Better Cause
author: Bro Richards
description:
Welcome to Inspired by a Better Cause—where average isn't the goal.

This is for young men who want to know Jesus Christ, build a real relationship with their Heavenly Father, discover their identity as Sons of God, and live with strength, honor, and purpose.

Live bold.
Live unashamed.
Live inspired by a better cause.

title: Operation Interstellar: The Quest Communication in Space
description: In a future where communication across the vastness of space seems impossible, Paul Grayson stands at the forefront of a groundbreaking discovery. He believes that Z-wave technology can bridge the gap, allowing for real-time conversations between distant worlds. But not everyone shares his vision. As he embarks on a daring mission to prove his theory, Paul faces fierce opposition from powerful forces determined to silence him. With his career and credibility on the line, he must navigate a web of intrigue and danger that threatens not just his work, but the future of interstellar communication itself. Join Paul on this thrilling journey filled with scientific exploration, personal sacrifice, and the relentless pursuit of truth. Can he overcome the obstacles in his path and change the way humanity connects across galaxies? Dive into 'Operation Interstellar' to find out how innovation and courage can clash with resistance and fear.

title: W!se Words
author: Working in Support of Education
description: W!se Words is a podcast from Working in Support of Education (W!se) that brings real conversations about money, life, and the choices that shape our futures. From financial literacy to career readiness, each episode breaks down the skills people need to succeed, both in and beyond the classroom.

title: The Aviation Bug
author: Capt. Mike Marblestone
description:
I sit down with some of the most fascinating people in the world—astronauts, fighter pilots, airline captains, corporate pilots… even actors, athletes, CEOs, and innovators who’ve all been bitten by the aviation bug. 
If you’ve ever looked up at the sky and felt something…
If you’ve ever wondered what drives the people who live up there…
If you’ve ever had even the smallest version of “the aviation bug”…
You’re in the right place. Let’s fly.

title: A Chain of Evidence: Impossible Murder
description: In a locked apartment, three people share an eerie night that ends in murder. When morning breaks, only one person lies dead, leaving the other two as suspects. How could this happen in a room without any way in or out? This gripping tale by Carolyn Wells unveils the tangled web of deceit, intrigue, and the search for truth. Listeners will be drawn into the minds of the characters as they navigate suspicion and uncover hidden motives. With twists that keep you guessing, 'Chain of Evidence' immerses you in a classic mystery that challenges perceptions of guilt and innocence. Each clue unravels more questions, leading to a chilling conclusion. Perfect for fans of crime fiction and mystery lovers alike, this audiobook promises to keep you on the edge of your seat.

title: The High Hander: A Frontier Showdown
description: In the rugged wilderness, Tesno is more than just a troubleshooter; he's the last line of defense for a railroad construction company facing deadly opposition. As the crew digs into the mountain, rumors of sabotage and murder swirl through the frontier towns. With lawlessness around every corner, Tesno must confront not only the threats to the project but also the dark forces that seek to undermine it. Braving the harsh landscape and the shadows of treachery, he carries a unique brand of justice, determined to protect his team and complete the mission. This gripping tale of action and adventure reveals the harsh realities of frontier life, where survival depends on strength, cunning, and the unwavering resolve to stand against the odds. Join Tesno on his quest for safety and justice in a world where the only law is the one you bring with you.

title: Intox Podcast

description: Intox Podcast

title: We Put The T In Therapy
author: We Put The T In Therapy
description: Have you ever gone down a rabbit hole over something random and somehow ended up talking about your childhood? Yeah...us too. We're Stacy and Jen, two therapists who love taking everyday experiences and asking, "What's really going on here?" From family dynamics, awkward conversations, anxiety, relationships, and everything in between. Some episodes will make you laugh and some may make you feel a little bit lighter. We're not here to diagnose your life. We're just fascinated by what makes people tick, and we have a habit of turning everyday conversations into meaningful ones. Join us!

title: The Opal Serpent: A Mysterious Heirloom
description: When a well known pawnbroker is found strangled, the only clue left behind is an opal serpent brooch pinning his lips shut. As the investigation unfolds, Detective Hurd faces a tangled web of family secrets and claims over the pawnbroker's vast estate. The plot thickens when his beautiful daughter emerges as the primary heir, only to be challenged by another woman who insists she is the rightful child. With two potential heirs and a murder to solve, Hurd must navigate through deceit and betrayal to find the truth. This thrilling tale combines rich characters with a gripping mystery, revealing the lengths people will go to for love, greed, and revenge. Join Hurd on his journey as he peels back the layers of this intricate case, leading to unexpected revelations that could change everything for the families involved.

title: Curated Consciousness
author: Curated Consiousness
description:
Curated Consciousness is a series of candid conversations with Amanda Jackson and Audrey Henriquez — two yoga teachers, mentors, and business women who stepped away from traditional 9-to-5 ways of working and built new paths in the yoga and wellness industry.

Through the lens of yoga, wellness, fascia, spirituality, sound healing, breathwork, ancient wisdom, and everyday life, Amanda and Audrey explore where consciousness is moving now — and what it means to live, work, heal, and lead from a more awakened place.

This podcast is not about chasing something new. It is about noticing the room we are already in. Our collective awareness has shifted, and many people are questioning the old ways of working, living, and relating to their bodies, minds, and purpose.

Amanda and Audrey bring grounded, honest conversations for people who may be standing where they once stood — ready for change, curious about yoga and healing, or wondering how ancient practices like breathwork, the I Ching, nervous system awareness, and embodiment remain relevant in modern life.

This is a space for inquiry, real-life wisdom, conscious work, and remembering that a different way of living is possible.

Some episodes are lighthearted, some are thought-provoking, and some are simply random thoughts that turn into meaningful conversations. Whether you're looking for a laugh, a fresh perspective, or just someone to listen to during your day, pull up a chair and join the conversation.

title: Minds that Think Differently: Reframing Neurodivergence Disability and Mental Health
author: Amanda
description: Minds That Think Differently is a podcast hosted by 16-year-old autistic advocate Amanda Murphy. Drawing on her own lived experiences, Amanda educates listeners about neurodivergence, disability, and mental health while challenging stigma and promoting understanding. This podcast is for everyone, whether you are neurodivergent, suspect you might be, want to support someone else in your life, or just want to learn more. Amanda strives to provide well-researched, accessible, and informative content. Join us in creating a world that better understands and supports people who think differently.

title: The Tennis Pros of San Diego - Unmatched
author: Conan Lorenzo and Marlen Miranda
description:
Welcome to the show! This is Conan Lorenzo and Marlen Miranda, and we’re the Tennis Pros of San Diego - Unmatched. 
Yes, we love tennis, but what we really care about is what makes people perform at their best. On the court, in the gym, and in life. We’re talking everything from injuries and recovery, to mindset, pressure, confidence…even the stuff athletes don’t always talk about. We’ll be bringing on coaches, athletes, and experts from all over the sports and health world to break it all down. So whether you play tennis or just want to live better—you’re in the right place.
Contact: Tennisprosofsd@gmail.com

title: MADEROYAL PODCAST
author: Trevor Joel
description: Welcome to the MADEROYAL Podcast! I’m Trevor Joel, here to empower you through faith, business, and authentic conversations. Join me and my friends as we explore identity in Christ, share stories, and dive into practical insights to help you live with purpose and passion. Let’s grow and create together!

title: The Coming of the Law: Justice in a Corrupt Town
description: In a small western town gripped by fear, young newspaper reporter Hollis arrives to claim his father's legacy: a ranch and a struggling newspaper. But he quickly discovers that the town is under the thumb of Dunlavey, a ruthless cattleman who acts as lawmaker and lawbreaker. With the local sheriff in his pocket, Dunlavey steals cattle from neighbors, leaving them powerless. As Hollis faces this daunting challenge, he must navigate a landscape of corruption and fear. Can he rally the townsfolk to stand up against an oppressive force and restore justice? This gripping story explores themes of courage, integrity, and the fight for what’s right in a lawless land. Join Hollis on his journey to bring about change and ensure that the rule of law prevails over tyranny.

title: Spilling the Tī
